query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `agentPushSubscriptions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `agentId` int NOT NULL,
  `endpoint` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `p256dh` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `auth` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `deviceLabel` varchar(200) DEFAULT '',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `agentPushSubscriptions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2d1S7viP934C9u9.root --database f39rghmcCDkVuc3rBX8cym --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `agentPushSubscriptions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `agentId` int NOT NULL,
  `endpoint` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `p256dh` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `auth` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `deviceLabel` varchar(200) DEFAULT '',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `agentPushSubscriptions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
